content: Lydia: Ugh, this inn reeks of piss and weak mead. I swear, if I have to smell one more fucking drunk Nord, I’ll start splitting heads just to quiet the room. Embry: Hey now, don’t be like that, sweetheart. You’re lookin’ kinda tight. Maybe you need a drink to loosen up those fine hips of yours. Lydia: The only thing that loosens me up is my thane’s cock ramming into my ass while Serana watches and seethes. But keep dreaming, you sad sack of mead-soaked meat. Embry: Gods, you’re a feisty one. Bet you put up a fight even when you’re gettin’ fucked. Lydia: Fighting is what I do best—whether it’s against bandits, Thalmor, or that undead slut Serana trying to steal my place in MJR’s bed. I’ll cleave anyone who gets in my way. Embry: You Stormcloaks always got a hard-on for violence. Me? I just wanna find some mead and a warm pair of tits to bury my face in. Lydia: Typical drunkard priorities. Skyrim’s a battlefield, and you’re too busy drowning in a barrel. You’d last two seconds against the Thalmor before they split you open like a roast pig. Embry: At least I’d die happy, with a belly full of ale and my cock in some willing wench. Sounds better than an arrow to the face. Lydia: Disgusting. Real warriors die with honor, not face-first in a tavern whore’s cunt. But I shouldn’t expect better from a man who can’t even swing a sword without pissing himself. Embry: Keep talkin’ like that, and I might just challenge you. Winner gets… well, whatever they want. Lydia: You’d lose, and then I’d cut off your balls and gift them to MJR as a trophy. Now shut up, I need to listen for any bandit sluts dumb enough to try ambushing him again today.

Lydia: Enough. I'm not wasting another breath on your drunken idiocy. I need to keep sharp—those bandit sluts won't slit their own throats. Embry: Fine, fine. But if you change your mind about that drink offer, you know where to find me. Right here, where the mead’s cheap and the regrets are plenty. Lydia: Ugh. Just stay out of my way before I carve a new hole in you to match your mouth.

Embry: Ugh... gods, my head. You got anything strong on ya, elf? Might trade ya this rusty dagger for a sip o' sumthin'... really anythin' at this point. Daegon: Oh, look, another pathetic Nord too weak to handle his mead. Why don't you crawl back into your piss-stained straw bed, Embry?

Embry: Gods, woman, yer tits are damn near spillin' outta that flimsy scrap o' cloth. Bet yer thane enjoys that view, eh? Lydia: Watch your tongue, drunkard, lest I cleave it from your skull. My body is for my Thane’s pleasure alone—not the drunken gawking of Riverwood’s failures. Embry: Whoa-ho, easy there, shield-sister! Just sayin’... if I had a woman like you, I’d never leave the bedroll. Bet MJR’s got ya bent over every damn ruin in Skyrim, huh? Lydia: Aye, and I take his cock like a true Nord—unlike that pale-blooded vampire slut Serana, who thinks moaning like a whore makes up for her lack of skill. Embry: Hah! Sounds like yer jealous, lass. Bet she sucks him dry better’n you ever could. Lydia: That Thalmor-loving cunt wouldn’t know a real man’s needs if they slapped her across the face. MJR craves strength, obedience—things provide while she’s off pretending elves deserve rights. Embry: Damn, woman, yer wound tighter than a Draugr’s asshole. Need a drink? Lydia: I need to shut your mead-soaked mouth before I introduce it to my blade. Embry: Alright, alright! Just tryin’ to be friendly… though I’d be friendlier if ya shared some o’ that ale ya got stashed. Lydia: Pathetic. Go drown in the White River for all I care.

Embry: Yeah, yeah... yer right scary when yer riled up. Think I'll just... uh... find another drink. Lydia: Smartest thing you've said all night, drunk. Now piss off before I lose my patience entirely. Embry: Gods, women these days... all fire and no fuckin' fun. Lydia: And men like you are all piss and no backbone. At least my Thane knows what to do with a real woman.
